# CWE-353 safe — Missing Support for Integrity Check (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-353-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/hmac"
	"crypto/sha256"
	"crypto/subtle"
	"encoding/hex"
	"errors"
	"io"
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

type SqlxDB struct{}

func (db *SqlxDB) Exec(query string, args ...interface{}) error { return nil }

func IngestTelemetry(c *GinCtx, db *SqlxDB) error {
	body, err := io.ReadAll(c.Request.Body)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte(os.Getenv("TELEMETRY_HMAC_KEY")))
	mac.Write(body)
	expected := mac.Sum(nil)
	got, err := hex.DecodeString(c.Request.Header.Get("X-Body-Mac"))
	if err != nil || subtle.ConstantTimeCompare(expected, got) != 1 {
		return errors.New("integrity check failed")
	}
	return db.Exec("INSERT INTO telemetry (payload) VALUES (?)", string(body))
}
